item.title: Minnesota immigration enforcement surge is ending, Trump border tsar says
item.description: Two US citizens were killed in Minneapolis during the crackdown dubbed "Operation Metro Surge".

item.title: Fact-checking Jim Ratcliffe's claims about immigration and benefits
item.description: BBC Verify has been examining some of the Manchester United owner's claims.

item.title: XL bully owner jailed over dog attack death
item.description: The court hears that the dogs who killed Ian Price in Staffordshire had previously attacked other people and pets.

item.title: Ratcliffe sorry language 'offended some' after immigration comments
item.description: The Manchester United co-owner previously said the UK had been "colonised" by immigrants.

item.title: 'Vast majority' of parents should be involved if children question their gender, schools told
item.description: School leaders welcome the "greater clarity" on how to handle the polarising issue for parents and pupils.
